scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (process.env.npm_config_user_agent && !process.env.npm_config_user_agent.includes('pnpm')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); } ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach(f => { try { fs.unlinkSync(f); } catch(e) {} });"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
